core_mechanism: spectral (eigenfunction) decomposition of a self-adjoint linear operator into a complete orthonormal eigenbasis under a weighted inner product, giving an exact series representation of an evolution problem, with a WKB/Liouville-Green short-wavelength asymptotic quantization of the high-order eigenvalues and eigenmodes
brief_reason: The abstract builds an exact solution from a discrete real spectrum and complete orthonormal eigenfunctions in a weighted Hilbert space and then applies the Liouville-Green (WKB) transformation to derive high-frequency asymptotic quantization formulas for the eigenvalues and eigenfunctions.
